description_long: This is a single-story brick house with a flat roof and a modern, rectangular layout. The front features a driveway with two parked cars, a small porch, and a main entry door adjacent to a garage. Large windows line the exterior walls, providing ample natural light to the interior rooms, which are visibly divided into living, kitchen, and bedroom spaces. The house includes a fenced backyard area and a side patio, both accessible from the interior. The roof is flat and appears to be accessible, with railings enclosing the outdoor spaces. The overall design is functional and urban, with clean lines and minimal decorative elements.
description: A modern, single-story brick house with a flat roof, large windows, a driveway, and fenced outdoor spaces. The design is clean and functional, suited for an urban neighborhood.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway with two cars, main entry door, garage, and large windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the fenced backyard, side patio, and the length of the house with visible windows.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard fence, rear windows, and the overall rectangular shape of the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway, garage, and additional windows along the side wall.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with a small porch, single door, adjacent garage, and minimal decorative elements.
